sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20908" key="braxufwni/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βρᾰχῠ-φωνία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20908.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">smallness, weakness of voice</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:1:21:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.21.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
